001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.controller;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import android.content.ContentValues;
005import android.content.Intent;
006import android.graphics.Bitmap;
007import android.graphics.Color;
008import android.net.Uri;
009import android.os.Bundle;
010import android.os.Environment;
011import android.provider.MediaStore;
012import android.view.LayoutInflater;
013import android.view.View;
014import android.view.ViewGroup;
015import android.widget.Toast;
016
017import androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultLauncher;
018import androidx.activity.result.contract.ActivityResultContracts;
019import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
020import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
021import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
022
023import java.io.OutputStream;
024
025import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
026import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.PixelCanvasView;
027import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.adapter.ColorSwatchAdapter;
028import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.adapter.LayerAdapter;
029import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.databinding.FragmentCanvasBinding;
030
031@AndroidEntryPoint
032public class DrawingCanvasFragment extends Fragment {
033
034  private FragmentCanvasBinding binding;
035  private LayerAdapter layerAdapter;
036  private ColorSwatchAdapter colorAdapter;
037  private ActivityResultLauncher<Intent> saveLauncher;
038  private ActivityResultLauncher<Intent> loadLauncher;
039
040
041  @Nullable
042  @Override
043  public View onCreateView(
044      @NonNull LayoutInflater inflater,
045      @Nullable ViewGroup container,
046      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
047  ) {
048    binding = FragmentCanvasBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
049    return binding.getRoot();
050  }
051
052  @Override
053  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
054    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
055
056    // -----------------------------
057    // File Picker Launchers
058    // -----------------------------
059    saveLauncher = registerForActivityResult(
060        new ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult(),
061        result -> {
062          if (result.getResultCode() == Activity.RESULT_OK && result.getData() != null) {
063            Uri uri = result.getData().getData();
064            if (uri != null) {
065              binding.pixelCanvas.saveToUri(uri);
066            }
067          }
068        }
069    );
070
071    loadLauncher = registerForActivityResult(
072        new ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult(),
073        result -> {
074          if (result.getResultCode() == Activity.RESULT_OK && result.getData() != null) {
075            Uri uri = result.getData().getData();
076            if (uri != null) {
077              binding.pixelCanvas.loadFromUri(uri);
078              layerAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
079            }
080          }
081        }
082    );
083
084    // -----------------------------
085    // Layer Panel Setup
086    // -----------------------------
087    layerAdapter = new LayerAdapter(binding.pixelCanvas);
088    binding.layerList.setLayoutManager(new androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
089    binding.layerList.setAdapter(layerAdapter);
090
091    // -----------------------------
092    // Color Palette Setup
093    // -----------------------------
094    int[] colors = new int[]{
095        Color.BLACK, Color.WHITE, Color.RED, Color.GREEN, Color.BLUE,
096        Color.YELLOW, Color.CYAN, Color.MAGENTA, 0xFFFF8800, 0xFFAA66CC
097    };
098
099    colorAdapter = new ColorSwatchAdapter(colors, color -> {
100      binding.pixelCanvas.setColor(color);
101    });
102
103    binding.colorPalette.setLayoutManager(new androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
104    binding.colorPalette.setAdapter(colorAdapter);
105
106    // -----------------------------
107    // Undo / Redo Buttons
108    // -----------------------------
109    binding.undoButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
110      binding.pixelCanvas.undo();
111      layerAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
112    });
113
114    binding.redoButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
115      binding.pixelCanvas.redo();
116      layerAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
117    });
118
119    // -----------------------------
120    // Save Button
121    // -----------------------------
122    binding.saveButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
123      Intent intent = new Intent(Intent.ACTION_CREATE_DOCUMENT);
124      intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE);
125      intent.setType("application/octet-stream");
126      intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TITLE, "project.pcp");
127      saveLauncher.launch(intent);
128    });
129
130    // -----------------------------
131    // Load Button
132    // -----------------------------
133    binding.loadButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
134      Intent intent = new Intent(Intent.ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT);
135      intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE);
136      intent.setType("*/*");
137      loadLauncher.launch(intent);
138    });
139  }
140
141
142  private void setupLayerPanel() {
143    layerAdapter = new LayerAdapter(binding.pixelCanvas);
144    binding.layerList.setLayoutManager(new androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
145    binding.layerList.setAdapter(layerAdapter);
146  }
147
148  private void setupColorPalette() {
149    int[] colors = new int[]{
150        Color.BLACK, Color.WHITE, Color.RED, Color.GREEN, Color.BLUE,
151        Color.YELLOW, Color.CYAN, Color.MAGENTA, 0xFFFF8800, 0xFFAA66CC
152    };
153
154    colorAdapter = new ColorSwatchAdapter(colors, color -> {
155      binding.pixelCanvas.setColor(color);
156    });
157
158    binding.colorPalette.setLayoutManager(new androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
159    binding.colorPalette.setAdapter(colorAdapter);
160  }
161
162  private void setupToolbar() {
163    // Undo/Redo
164    binding.undoButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
165      binding.pixelCanvas.undo();
166      layerAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
167    });
168
169    binding.redoButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
170      binding.pixelCanvas.redo();
171      layerAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
172    });
173
174    // Tool selection
175    binding.pencilButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
176      binding.pixelCanvas.setTool(PixelCanvasView.Tool.PENCIL);
177      highlightSelectedTool(binding.pencilButton);
178    });
179
180    binding.eraserButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
181      binding.pixelCanvas.setTool(PixelCanvasView.Tool.ERASER);
182      highlightSelectedTool(binding.eraserButton);
183    });
184
185    binding.fillBucketButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
186      binding.pixelCanvas.setTool(PixelCanvasView.Tool.FILL_BUCKET);
187      highlightSelectedTool(binding.fillBucketButton);
188    });
189
190    binding.eyedropperButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
191      binding.pixelCanvas.setTool(PixelCanvasView.Tool.EYEDROPPER);
192      highlightSelectedTool(binding.eyedropperButton);
193    });
194
195    // Zoom and export
196    binding.resetZoomButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
197      binding.pixelCanvas.resetZoom();
198    });
199
200    binding.exportButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
201      exportToPng();
202    });
203
204    // Set default tool highlight
205    highlightSelectedTool(binding.pencilButton);
206  }
207
208  private void highlightSelectedTool(View selectedButton) {
209    // Reset all tool buttons
210    binding.pencilButton.setAlpha(0.5f);
211    binding.eraserButton.setAlpha(0.5f);
212    binding.fillBucketButton.setAlpha(0.5f);
213    binding.eyedropperButton.setAlpha(0.5f);
214
215    // Highlight selected
216    selectedButton.setAlpha(1.0f);
217  }
218
219  private void exportToPng() {
220    try {
221      Bitmap bitmap = binding.pixelCanvas.exportToBitmap();
222
223      ContentValues values = new ContentValues();
224      values.put(MediaStore.Images.Media.DISPLAY_NAME, "pixel_art_" + System.currentTimeMillis() + ".png");
225      values.put(MediaStore.Images.Media.MIME_TYPE, "image/png");
226      values.put(MediaStore.Images.Media.RELATIVE_PATH, Environment.DIRECTORY_PICTURES);
227
228      Uri uri = requireContext().getContentResolver().insert(
229          MediaStore.Images.Media.EXTERNAL_CONTENT_URI, values);
230
231      if (uri != null) {
232        try (OutputStream out = requireContext().getContentResolver().openOutputStream(uri)) {
233          bitmap.compress(Bitmap.CompressFormat.PNG, 100, out);
234          Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "Exported to Pictures", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
235        }
236      }
237    } catch (Exception e) {
238      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "Export failed: " + e.getMessage(), Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
239      e.printStackTrace();
240    }
241  }
242
243  @Override
244  public void onDestroyView() {
245    super.onDestroyView();
246    binding = null;
247  }
248}
